scripts.dev: concurrently -n HUB,MARKET,BET -c cyan,yellow,green "npm run dev --workspace=apps/hub" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/market" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/bet"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/hub && npm run build --workspace=apps/market && npm run build --workspace=apps/bet
scripts.clean: npx rimraf apps/*/node_modules apps/*/dist packages/*/node_modules node_modules
